void_narratives.concept_01_event_horizon: Sound at the edge of disappearance. Maximum tension, zero release.
void_narratives.concept_02_cold_ignition: Frozen textures suddenly igniting into distorted neuro-bass.
void_narratives.concept_04_absolute_stillness: A track with zero transients, only shifting spectral masses.
void_narratives.usage: Used as the [CONCEPT] anchor in the L1 Core (Block 3).
